message:
feat: implement MoE forward pass with dequantization

Complete MoE FFN implementation:
- Add Q8_0 dequantization for router and expert weights
- Implement f16ToF32 conversion for deltas
- Call moe.moeFFN() with real weights
- Measure performance for single layer
- Estimate 32-layer throughput

Technical details:
- Dequantize router: n_embd × n_expert weights
- Dequantize experts: 8 experts × 3 matrices each
- Run MoE FFN with top-2 expert routing
- Report time per token and tok/s

Next step: Download Mixtral model to test with real weights
